title: FTS database disk image is malformed for UTF-16 encoding after update
poc: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt0 USING fts5(c0);
key_bug_features: UPDATE vt0 SET c0=NULL causes database corruption
bug_features_seed: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt0 USING fts5(c0 TEXT);
UPDATE vt0 SET c0=NULL WHERE c0 IS NOT NULL;
